# mijnhost_domain (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a mijn.host domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mijnhost_domain" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}

output "renewal_date" {
  value = data.mijnhost_domain.example.renewal_date
}

output "status" {
  value = data.mijnhost_domain.example.status
}

output "tags" {
  value = data.mijnhost_domain.example.tags
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to look up (e.g. example.com).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The domain name (used as the data source ID).
- `renewal_date` (String) The date on which the domain will be renewed (YYYY-MM-DD).
- `status` (String) The current status of the domain (e.g. active, Cancelled).
- `tags` (List of String) Tags associated with the domain.
